Name: Color Grading
Description: Applies color grading using lookup tables (LUTs) to remap scene colors for artistic or cinematic effects. Supports smooth transitions between grading profiles over time.

Fields.Name: Enable Color Grading
Fields.Description: Enables or disables the color grading pass. When disabled, the scene is displayed without LUT-based color adjustments.

Fields.Name: LUT Source ID
Fields.Description: Identifier of the color grading LUT texture. Defines the color transformation applied to the final image.
